crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_msg: ET INFO Observed Discord Domain (discord .com in TLS SNI)
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert tls $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"ET INFO Observed Discord Domain (discord .com in TLS SNI)"; flow:established,to_server; tls.sni; dotprefix; content:".discord.com"; endswith; reference:md5,03f93498e1006ffa3a1f9fcb6170525a; classtype:misc-activity; sid:2035463; rev:3; metadata:created_at 2022_03_15, former_category INFO, signature_severity Informational, updated_at 2022_09_21;)

crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_msg: ET INFO Observed Discord Domain in DNS Lookup (discord .com)
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert dns $HOME_NET any -> any any (msg:"ET INFO Observed Discord Domain in DNS Lookup (discord .com)"; dns.query; dotprefix; content:".discord.com"; endswith; reference:md5,03f93498e1006ffa3a1f9fcb6170525a; classtype:misc-activity; sid:2035465; rev:4; metadata:created_at 2022_03_15, former_category INFO, signature_severity Informational, updated_at 2022_09_21;)

crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_msg: ET INFO External IP Lookup Domain (ipify .org) in DNS Lookup
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert dns $HOME_NET any -> any any (msg:"ET INFO External IP Lookup Domain (ipify .org) in DNS Lookup"; dns.query; dotprefix; content:".ipify.org"; nocase; endswith; classtype:misc-activity; sid:2047702; rev:1; metadata:affected_product Any, attack_target Client_and_Server, created_at 2023_08_22, deployment Perimeter, performance_impact Low, confidence High, signature_severity Informational, tag External_IP_Lookup, updated_at 2023_08_22, reviewed_at 2023_10_06;)

crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_msg: ET INFO External IP Address Lookup Domain (ipify .org) in TLS SNI
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert tls $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"ET INFO External IP Address Lookup Domain (ipify .org) in TLS SNI"; flow:established,to_server; tls.sni; dotprefix; content:".ipify.org"; endswith; fast_pattern; classtype:misc-activity; sid:2047703; rev:1; metadata:affected_product Any, attack_target Client_and_Server, created_at 2023_08_22, deployment Perimeter, former_category INFO, performance_impact Low, confidence High, signature_severity Informational, tag External_IP_Lookup, updated_at 2023_08_22, reviewed_at 2023_08_22;)

crowdsourced_yara_results.description: Detects executables Discord URL observed in first stage droppers
crowdsourced_yara_results.author: ditekSHen

attributes.magic: PE32 executable (GUI) Intel 80386 Mono/.Net assembly, for MS Windows

sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects suspicious new RUN key element pointing to an executable in a suspicious folder
sigma_analysis_results.rule_title: New RUN Key Pointing to Suspicious Folder
sigma_analysis_results.rule_author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Markus Neis, Sander Wiebing

sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects threat actors proxy executing code and bypassing application controls by leveraging wmic and the `/FORMAT` argument switch to download and execute an XSL file (i.e js, vbs, etc).
Detects the execution of WMIC in order to get a list of firewall and antivirus products
Detects DNS queries for IP lookup services such as "api.ipify.org" originating from a non browser process.
sigma_analysis_results.rule_title: Suspicious DNS Query for IP Lookup Service APIs

sigma_analysis_results.rule_description:
Detects regsitry value settings that would replace the user's desktop background.
This is a common technique used by malware to change the desktop background to a ransom note or other image.
sigma_analysis_results.rule_title: Potentially Suspicious Desktop Background Change Via Registry

sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects the creation of an ADS (Alternate Data Stream) that contains an executable by looking at a non-empty Imphash
sigma_analysis_results.rule_title: Hidden Executable In NTFS Alternate Data Stream

sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects modification of autostart extensibility point (ASEP) in registry.
sigma_analysis_results.rule_author: Victor Sergeev, Daniil Yugoslavskiy, Gleb Sukhodolskiy, Timur Zinniatullin, oscd.community, Tim Shelton, frack113 (split)

sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects the execution of WMIC with the "csproduct" which is used to obtain information such as hardware models and vendor information
